competencies: Analyze power electronic converter circuits
Design choppers, rectifiers and self-commutated bridges
Understand DC-link and H-bridge converter topologies
Apply power electronics to electrical drive and supply systems
description_en: Covers fundamental power electronic circuits including choppers, bridges and rectifiers with methods and applications in electrical engineering.

competencies: Model power grid topology and equipment in modal components
Perform power flow and short-circuit calculations
Carry out state estimation for power systems
Analyze small-signal and transient grid stability
Model power grids with MATLAB
description_en: Teaches steady-state and quasi-steady-state algorithms to model power grids for planning, including power flow, stability and state estimation.

competencies: Analyze the state of science and technology
Develop scientific project ideas and specifications
Perform a market analysis
Write and structure a scientific project report
Defend project results in oral presentations
description_en: Project seminar teaching scientific working methods, literature survey, good citation practice and scientific report writing in electrical engineering.

competencies: Mathematically describe and analyze dynamic systems
Design feedback control systems in time and frequency domain
Apply the root locus and frequency response methods
Design state variable feedback and observers
description_en: Introduces analysis of dynamic systems and design of feedback control using frequency-domain, time-domain and state-space techniques.

competencies: Analyze MIMO LTI systems for stability, controllability and observability
Use canonical state representations and Kalman decomposition
Design state feedback controllers via eigenvalue assignment and LQR
Design state observers to reconstruct unmeasured states
description_en: Advanced state-space methods for analysis and control of continuous- and discrete-time MIMO LTI systems with feedback and observer design.

competencies: Apply control and automation theory to practical systems
Conduct laboratory automation experiments
Implement distributed control systems in practice
Evaluate experimental automation results
description_en: Laboratory applying knowledge from Systems and Control and Distributed Control Systems to practical process automation experiments.

competencies: Design distributed digital automation systems
Plan integration of automation components
Apply automation and information models such as OPC UA
Interpret abstract automation and information technology models
description_en: Covers design and construction of distributed digital automation systems, integration technologies and information models like OPC UA.

competencies: Model distributed parameter systems with partial differential equations
Solve linear PDEs with constant coefficients
Analyze stability of infinite-dimensional systems
Design flatness-based and backstepping controllers for PDE systems
description_en: Modeling, analysis and control of distributed parameter systems described by partial differential equations using flatness-based and backstepping methods.

competencies: Apply machine learning approaches to dynamical systems and control
Analyze ML algorithms for solving dynamical problems
Design classifiers for dynamical data
Use reinforcement learning and Koopman theory for control
Implement learning-based control in MATLAB/Python
description_en: Connects machine learning with systems theory to design learning-based modelling and control approaches for dynamical systems.

competencies: Describe and model nonlinear systems
Analyze nonlinear system dynamics and stability
Apply Lyapunov, BIBO stability and passivity concepts
Design controllers for nonlinear systems via input-output linearization
description_en: Teaches modeling, stability analysis and controller design for nonlinear systems using Lyapunov theory, passivity and input-output linearization.

competencies: Formulate and analyze constrained optimal control problems
Apply dynamic programming and the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation
Use variational calculus and Pontryagin's maximum principle
Derive numerical solutions for optimal control problems
description_en: Introduces formulation, theory and numerical solution of constrained optimal control problems for dynamic systems across many applications.

competencies: Apply multivariable and decentralized process control methods
Tune and implement PID controllers
Select control configurations for multi-unit processes
Use MATLAB for computer-aided control system design
description_en: Covers multivariable process control with emphasis on decentralized control, PID tuning and plantwide control via simulation case studies.

competencies: Analyze advanced systems theory and control concepts mathematically
Research and synthesize scientific literature on a special topic
Develop proofs and theoretical arguments independently
Communicate results and give constructive peer feedback
description_en: Seminar on advanced systems theory and control engineering topics requiring literature research, mathematical analysis and scientific presentation.

competencies: Assess observability of process models
Design Luenberger observers for LTI systems
Implement Kalman, extended and unscented Kalman filters
Tune state estimation algorithms for linear and nonlinear systems
description_en: Introduces model-based state estimation and measurement systems with emphasis on Luenberger observers and Kalman filter variants.

competencies: Explain methods of automatic speech recognition with Hidden Markov Models
Apply feature extraction and classification techniques to speech
Use DTW, Viterbi and Baum-Welch algorithms
Design robust practical speech recognition systems
description_en: Teaches methods of automatic speech recognition using Hidden Markov Models, feature extraction, language models and robust system design.

competencies: Build chatbot systems with the Rasa framework
Train and evaluate natural language understanding models
Collect and prepare classification training data
Conduct UX user tests and derive improvements
Manage an AI project from idea to productive deployment
description_en: Project building an AI-driven Rasa chatbot for an escape-room game, covering NLU model training, evaluation and UX user testing.

competencies: Understand the system theory of imaging systems
Explain the functional principle of computed tomography
Apply mathematical methods of tomographic image reconstruction
Handle beam geometries and reconstruction artefacts
description_en: Introduces system theory of imaging, X-ray physics and mathematical methods of tomographic image reconstruction in computed tomography.

competencies: Apply digital signal processing methods in practice
Implement digital filters and Fourier transforms
Use feature space transformations for signals
Estimate Gaussian models under maximum-likelihood assumptions
description_en: Laboratory applying digital signal processing methods including digital filters, Fourier transforms and feature space transformations to speech.

competencies: Explain architectures of GPU, FPGA and AI accelerators
Select suitable accelerators for given applications
Design and implement parallel programs for heterogeneous systems
Evaluate performance, energy and scalability of heterogeneous systems
description_en: Teaches architecture, programming and integration of hardware accelerators like GPUs, FPGAs and AI accelerators into CPU-based systems.

competencies: Apply fundamental methods of image and video coding
Estimate the information content of images
Develop encoders for image and video compression
Evaluate coding methods for still and moving images
description_en: Teaches fundamental methods of image and video coding from information-theoretical to semantic techniques for compression and communication.

competencies: Search and classify scientific literature on SoC topics
Develop research questions from the state of the art
Present acquired knowledge systematically
Gain insight into current System-on-Chip research
description_en: Seminar where students survey the state of the art of a System-on-Chip research topic and present it through scientific literature work.

competencies: Define the structure of application-specific SoCs
Evaluate hardware architecture design alternatives
Perform design space exploration with simulation tools
Select and parameterize optimization methods for chip design
description_en: Covers structure and hardware architecture of System-on-Chips, on-chip communication networks and design space exploration with optimization.

competencies: Model AC electric machines using space vector representation
Apply field-oriented control to PMSM and induction machines
Tune control loops for AC drives
Assess drive types and control algorithms for applications
description_en: Teaches dynamic models of AC electric machines and field-oriented and direct torque control algorithms for adjustable-speed AC drives.

competencies: Apply power system protection concepts to network elements
Configure protection settings for lines, transformers and generators
Implement digital signal processing for protection
Design adaptive and intelligent protection systems
description_en: Teaches power system protection concepts and digital signal processing algorithms for protecting lines, transformers, generators and busbars.

competencies: Understand EMC concepts, principles and regulations
Apply shielding, filtering and coupling reduction measures
Analyze the EMC of electrical and electronic systems
Use EMC measurement techniques
description_en: Covers concepts, measurement techniques and design measures to analyze and improve the electromagnetic compatibility of electronic systems.

competencies: Explain operation of two-level and multilevel three-phase converters
Design finite and continuous control set MPC strategies
Formulate and solve constrained optimization for real-time control
Apply MPC to electric drives and grid-connected converters
description_en: Teaches model predictive control techniques for three-phase power converters with applications to electric drives and grid-connected resources.

competencies: Assess solar resources for electrical power generation
Understand solar-electrical energy conversion principles
Design photovoltaic systems
Address grid connection and storage integration requirements
description_en: Teaches assessment of solar resources, working principles of PV systems and design of photovoltaic systems including grid and storage integration.

competencies: Characterize power semiconductor components such as IGBT, MOSFET and diodes
Understand packaging and assembly of power components
Dimension component stress in power supply and drive systems
Assess reliability in power electronic systems
description_en: Covers power semiconductor components and their interaction with power supply and drive systems, including dimensioning and reliability.

competencies: Explain energy conversion of renewable energy sources
Understand the regulatory framework for renewables
Address grid integration challenges of renewable energy
Evaluate energy storage possibilities and limitations
description_en: Introduces energy conversion of wind, photovoltaic, biomass and fuel cells with their regulatory framework and grid integration challenges.

competencies: Describe radiation principles and types of ionizing radiation
Distinguish active and passive medical imaging methods
Apply system theory to medical imaging systems
Describe image quality using observer models and ROC curves
description_en: Introduces radiation physics, medical imaging system theory and Fourier- and task-based image quality description using observer models.

competencies: Work on a research-related topic under supervision
Perform research including literature review
Develop an independent research project
Apply and deepen knowledge in a scientific context
description_en: Supervised research project where students apply their knowledge, perform literature research and develop an independent scientific project.

competencies: Work scientifically on a delimited research problem
Select and apply suitable scientific methods
Critically evaluate and contextualize results
Write and defend a research-oriented master's thesis
description_en: Master's thesis in which students independently solve a research problem with scientific methods and present and defend the results.

competencies: Design distributed digital automation systems
Plan integration of automation components
Interpret abstract automation and information technology models
Apply IT and automation technologies to integrate components
description_en: Covers design and construction of distributed digital automation systems including component integration via IT and automation technologies.
